trivia: The best-selling super-midsize business jet of its era: transcontinental range, a flat-floor cabin and canted winglets. Charter fleets love it, which keeps it surprisingly visible to hobby antennas.
Super-midsize means it turns up on routes from city pairs you would never predict, a nice source of Fleet variety.
funFacts: Consistently the world's most-delivered business jet in its class.
